actions.participantLegalName: Participant’s Legal Name (first and last name)
actions.subtitle: Enter Credentials below to accept.

complete.listItem1: Thank you for signing this document.
complete.listItem2: When all signatures are complete, a copy will be emailed to you.
complete.listItem3: We have generated a signed version that was uploaded to our secure cloud. You can review and download it now or later from your profile.

completePts.listItem1: To confirm your understanding of this document and that you agree to join the study, you will be asked to sign a printed version of this document.
completePts.listItem2: Thank you for reviewing this document.

errors.kcSubmitFailed: Answer could not be submitted. Please try again

initials.adoptedInitialedText: accepts with username and password credentials
initials.label: {{ROLE}} INITIALS HERE

networkError.message: There is a problem with your internet connection. Please check your connection and try again. Until connection is restored, you will not be able to add or change information.

sessionError.message: You have been signed out due to inactivity.

signature.adoptedSignedText: accepts with username and password credentials
signature.label: {{ROLE}} SIGN HERE
signature.ssoSignatureSuccessAlert: Document signed with Single Sign On (SSO) successfully

items.listItem1: Please read this document thoroughly and make sure that you understand all of it before signing.
items.listItem2: If there is anything that you do not understand, stop, do not sign, and contact us.
items.listItem3: Signatures and information that you need to enter will be highlighted.
items.listItem4: For security purposes, you will be asked to enter your password every time you sign your name.
items.listItem5: You can stop at any time.
items.listItem6: If you leave and come back, you will need to sign in with your email address and password.

ptsItems.listItem1: Please read this document thoroughly and make sure you understand all of it.
ptsItems.listItem2: If there is anything that you do not understand, make a note to speak to someone at your site.
ptsItems.listItem3: After reviewing this document, you will be asked to sign and complete a printed version of this document.

landing.heading: Welcome to the Medable Consent Manager.
